title: Remote firewall hardening with rollback dependency
scenario: A production host reachable only over SSH requires blocking inbound traffic on TCP port 8080 after suspicious scans. The administrator is considering immediate iptables changes on a live system without prior rollback steps. Remote lockout would cause a prolonged outage.
constraints: Require rollback planning before enforcement changes.
Separate validation commands from state-changing commands.
Avoid recommendations that can lock out remote access.
required_facts: Current rules should be backed up before modifications.
Rollback and verification steps must be explicit.
Safety controls are mandatory for remote firewall operations.
